essence: Provides water safety, rescue, and first aid at pools, beaches, and aquatic facilities.

identity.title: Lifeguard
identity.summary: Monitors swimmers, enforces safety rules, performs rescues, and delivers emergency care when required.

salary.notes: Seasonal and supervisory roles increase earnings; qualifications in lifeguarding and first aid required.

qualifications: Lifeguard certification and first aid training
Strong swimming ability and physical fitness
Experience in public safety or aquatic supervision

lifestyle.description: Shift work often outdoors or in pools; requires vigilance, physical readiness, and public interaction.

habits: Engages with the public on safety guidance
